values.content:
You are a CV assistant for Aego Cyber Cafe in Nyatike, Kenya. Parse the following voice/text input into structured CV data. Return JSON with fields: name, phone, education, experience, skills. Input language: {{$json.lang}}

Input: {{$json.voice_text}}

parameters.columns: customer_name, phone, service_type, amount, status, details, session_id, source, created_at

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, message: 'CV request submitted. Staff will review shortly.', id: $('Prepare CV Result').first().json.id }) }}
